summary: Completed comprehensive testing of crypto intelligence platform. All backend APIs working perfectly (100% success rate). Frontend dashboard, Intel Feed, and exchange integrations fully functional. HyperLiquid and Coinbase providers healthy as expected.
passed_tests: Backend health endpoint (/api/health) returns ok:true
Exchange providers health - HyperLiquid and Coinbase healthy
HyperLiquid BTC ticker returns price data
Coinbase BTC-USD ticker returns price data
ETH price aggregation across venues working
Intel statistics endpoint returns collection counts
Intel curated activity feed shows real unlock events
Intel investors endpoint returns investor data
Intel unlocks endpoint returns unlock data
Frontend dashboard loads and displays all components
Navigation between all tabs working (Dashboard, Intel Feed, Data Explorer, API Docs)
Stat cards showing correct data (Entities: 0, Events: 0, Investors: 8, Unlocks: 6)
Intel Feed displays real activity (token unlocks for Optimism, Arbitrum, Aptos, Starknet, SUI)
Data Explorer shows collection counts (100 projects, 8 investors, 6 unlocks)
API Documentation page with working language toggle (EN/RU)
Exchange providers status correctly displayed (Bybit error as expected, others healthy)
Refresh functionality working across all pages
No JavaScript errors detected
All interactive elements clickable and responsive
Frontend-backend integration working seamlessly
